During the events of the [[Mission to Panna Prime]], one of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] '''bases''' was located in an [[Unidentified asteroid field (Rebel Alliance base)|asteroid field]].

==History==
[[File:Ringbase.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Rebel communications officer working at the Ring Base.]]
Tasked with recovering a mystical [[Talisman (artifact)|Talisman]] for the Rebellion, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] nearly crashed into the base on their return trip due to the effects of the [[sleeping virus]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had contaminated the talisman with. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the two [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] set out from the base in a [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter]] to track them down after the near-crash.

[[General/Legends|General]] [[Ristt]] was the ranking [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the base. Other known personnel included [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], several Rebel communications operators and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kazan]]. Kazan commanded the Alliance [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[RS Revenge]] that was stationed at the base.

{{Loc-stub}}
